business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio

positives: Fire alarms are hard-wired with central station monitoring
Written contracts with indemnification are required from all contractors
No claims reported in prior insurance history for 2022-2024
No policy cancellations reported in prior insurance history for 2022-2024
Recent system updates noted: Plumbing 2015, HVAC 2018, Electrical 2023
concerns: Building is not fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R
One listed manufacturing location is not sprinklered
Short-term rentals of less than 1 year are permitted
Written contracts with all subcontractors are not in place
Commercial occupancy exists within the building
Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) are not maintained
Lockout/tagout procedures are not in place
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Prior insurance history shows 0 claims and no cancellations for 2024 (Liberty Mutual Insurance), 2023 (Hartford Financial Services), and 2022 (Chubb Limited).
